name: python3-html5lib
title: python3-html5lib
summary: HTML parser/tokenizer based on the WHATWG HTML5 specification
description:
HTML parser/tokenizer based on the WHATWG HTML5 specification
html5lib is a pure-python library for parsing HTML. It is designed to
conform to the HTML 5 specification, which has formalized the error handling
algorithms of popular web browsers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-html5lib because HTML parser/tokenizer based on the WHATWG HTML5 specification.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-html5lib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-html5lib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-html5lib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
